text.title: Dev Methodologies — Architecture Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the service backend AND has tests AND can iterate per pattern?

text.example: Audit finds n-plus-one + cache without TTL + printf logs → priority queue → fix n-plus-one (assert query count) → wrap cache with TTL → swap to structured logger → p95 drops 800→120ms.
